description: Search the knowledge base with full-text or vector (semantic) search (POST /api/search).
rules: read-only: queries the server, mutates nothing
writes the search results JSON to record_store/search_results.json
degrades gracefully (status=unreachable, exit 0) when the server is down
usage: Set OPEN_NOTEBOOK_URL and SEARCH_QUERY (SEARCH_TYPE, SEARCH_LIMIT optional). Output: search_results.json.
limitation: Requires a reachable Open Notebook server; vector search needs an embedding provider configured server-side.
